features: „ÄêIP66 Weatherproof Extension Lead„ÄëThe waterproof rating can reach IP66. The socket box is not only waterproof but also dustproof.

„Äê15m Long Extension Cable„Äë15 meters in length, fitted with individual switch, 13A current, 3250W Rated Power and 250V Voltage, ideal for parties, garden weeding, car washing and other outdoor electricity use occasions.
„ÄêLock Holes and Buckle Design Box„ÄëThe outdoor socket can directly install the padlock to prevent stealing electricity. And It also can be opened at any time when it needs electricity.

„ÄêHigh Quality Material„ÄëThis outdoor single socket using high quality PC material, has the ability to resist high and low temperatures, UV protection, corrosion resistance. Long service life and durable.
